tasks.title: CleanlineModels: core data-domain types
acceptance_criteria: All types compile with the exact signatures locked in tech_specs
Codable round-trip unit tests pass for TraceDocument and VectorDocument
Package builds standalone with zero dependency on any other Cleanline package

tasks.title: Cross-cutting resilience & accessibility shared types
acceptance_criteria: Compiles as sibling files in the same target without modifying any T-001 file
PipelineError enumerates every stage failure named in tech_specs
ProcessingStage.allCases order matches the locked sequence exactly

tasks.title: Services-lane shared value types: QualityMetrics, ExportArtifact
acceptance_criteria: Compiles alongside T-001/T-002 files with zero edits to either
QualityMetrics carries all five locked metric fields
ExportArtifact exposes a file URL, never raw Data

tasks.title: CleanlineDesignSystem: tokens and shared components
acceptance_criteria: Color/typography/spacing tokens match the locked values exactly (paper #F6F1E7, ink #17140F, teal #2F6F63, orange #C1531B)
PathCanvas is the single shared render surface reused by both Compare and Edit modes
Every component holds up at accessibility Dynamic Type sizes without truncation
No gradients or heavy drop shadows anywhere in the component set

tasks.title: CleanlinePersistence: TraceStore, atomic checkpoints, staging/reconciliation
acceptance_criteria: Kill-mid-write test proves the prior checkpoint survives untouched
Staging mechanism matches the locked design exactly: provisional-ID keyed staging, no TraceDocument or Recents visibility before the gate resolves
Startup reconciliation sweep scans staging only and deterministically promotes-on-accept or deletes-on-reject
listAllMetadata rebuilds purely by scanning per-trace folders, never trusting a separate index

tasks.title: App shell skeletons: AppRoute, AppRouter, AppModel, TraceSession
acceptance_criteria: AppRouter.route(for:) is the only function deciding where a reopened trace lands
AppModel.startNewTrace takes typed CapturedImage, never raw Data
TraceSession owns interruptionRecoveryState with acknowledgeInterruptionRecovery() clearing it to .none
zoomScale/panOffset/selectedPathIDs are transient and never checkpointed
Compiles against CleanlinePersistence's real TraceStore, not a stub

tasks.title: Fixture production: locked sketches, bad-photo set, adversarial case
acceptance_criteria: Four good fixtures span the four locked acceptance-bar classes
One dedicated bad-photo fixture per each of the seven named rejection reasons, with the induced condition documented in the README
Nested-closed-loop adversarial case present for winding-rule testing

tasks.title: Fake service implementations backed by fixtures
acceptance_criteria: Each fake conforms exactly to its real protocol
Fakes return fixture-realistic results keyed by which fixture was passed in, not arbitrary canned data
UI, edit, and export lanes can build a full click-through demo using only these fakes

tasks.title: Capture and import services
acceptance_criteria: CaptureService (AVFoundation) returns CapturedImage with correct CGImagePropertyOrientation
ImportService (PHPickerViewController) remains fully usable when camera permission is denied
Camera-permission-denied never dead-ends the flow

tasks.title: Normalization service
acceptance_criteria: Orientation fix, perspective correction, and EXIF/location/timestamp strip all happen before the quality gate runs
HEIC orientation respected on all four fixtures with zero silent rotation/mirroring
Ruled/grid paper distinguished from foreground sketch lines on the messy-notebook fixture
Writes correctly into T-005's staging mechanism

tasks.title: Quality gate service
acceptance_criteria: Each of the seven named rejection reasons is independently triggerable against its dedicated fixture
All four good fixtures pass the gate
sketchTooFaint and contrastTooLow are distinctly triggered by different fixtures, never conflated
No deliberately-bad fixture silently passes

tasks.title: New Trace Intake + Camera Capture screens
acceptance_criteria: Both camera and import entry points are reachable from this screen
Camera-permission-denied keeps the camera card visible with a same-screen 'Import a Photo Instead' escape hatch
Scope-defense copy ('dark linework on plain paper, one sketch at a time') is present
Unreadable/unsupported images produce a specific error state, never a crash

tasks.title: Quality Gate + Correction Review screen
acceptance_criteria: All five variants implemented: checking, rejected (all 7 reasons), corrected-preview-ready, correction-failed, resuming-from-checkpoint
Rejection cards use one safety-orange treatment differentiated only by icon glyph, each with a full-text accessibility label
Original/Corrected is a segmented switch, not a gesture
Large Dynamic Type never truncates rejection title/actions
Buildable and demoable entirely against T-008's fakes before T-011 lands for real

tasks.title: Vectorization spike (single-fixture go/no-go)
acceptance_criteria: icon-sketch fixture runs end to end: normalized image to VectorDocument to rasterized-and-diffed SVG
Node count reported
A clear go/no-go verdict is recorded, not just a passing test

tasks.title: Production VectorizationEngine (all fixture classes)
acceptance_criteria: All four fixture classes meet the locked clean-trace bar: bounded node counts, no sub-3pt orphan fragments, continuous strokes where expected, correct winding/fill, clean downstream-open in a mainstream vector tool
Progress callback emits named ProcessingStage values only, never a percent
Adversarial nested-loop fixture passes the winding-rule test

tasks.title: Processing screen
acceptance_criteria: Named sequential stage labels shown, no percent progress bar
Tracing-paths stage reveals real completed path data in a ~40-60ms/path stagger capped at 900ms
Reduce Motion replaces the stagger with final state plus text labels, never a blank screen
Trace-failed state offers Retry and Adjust Photo as distinct actions
Buildable against T-008's fakes ahead of T-015 landing for real

tasks.title: Trace Workspace: shared session state + Compare mode
acceptance_criteria: One canvas, one TraceSession-owned zoom/pan/selection state shared across both modes
Compare/Edit toggle is a 150ms crossfade of overlay controls only; canvas never re-lays-out
Wipe gesture arms only via a visible handle and only below ~1.15x zoom; above that, Original/Traced segmented toggle is the comparison method for everyone
No double-tap-to-zoom anywhere in the workspace
Reopened traces land here at their last committed state

tasks.title: CleanlineEdit: pure reducer
acceptance_criteria: EditEngine.apply(_:to:) is a pure reducer with no side effects
Adversarial sequence tests pass: delete-all, merge-with-self throws the defensive precondition error, redo-after-new-edit invalidates the stale redo stack
Fully buildable and testable against T-008's fakes without waiting on T-015

tasks.title: CleanlineExport: SVG/PDF serializers
acceptance_criteria: Both SVG and PDF contain real vector paths, never a flattened image
Rasterize-and-diff tests pass against fixtures, not just XML-validity checks
Winding/fill-rule verified correct on export
Fully buildable against T-008's fakes without waiting on T-015

tasks.title: Trace Workspace: Edit mode + accessible path list
acceptance_criteria: Fixed, always-visible bottom tool strip (Select/Delete, Simplify, Merge, Undo, Redo), never collapsed into a menu
Simplify slider previews on a downsampled render while dragging (debounced, cancel-aware), commits full-resolution only on release
Path-list rows expose select/delete/merge as direct .accessibilityAction entries, zero required canvas interaction
Tap-to-select only arms in Edit mode

tasks.title: Export sheet
acceptance_criteria: Summonable as a modal sheet from either Workspace mode, not a navigation push
States ready/exporting/success(share sheet)/failed-but-saved all implemented
Failed-but-saved explicitly states the trace remains in Recents and can be re-exported later

tasks.title: Recents Home + reopen/delete flows
acceptance_criteria: Empty and populated states both designed
Status chips match the three-value TraceStatus vocabulary exactly
Reopening a trace routes only through AppRouter.route(for:)
Delete is manual-only, unbounded count, no silent eviction

tasks.title: Settings screen
acceptance_criteria: Plain-language on-device/local-storage statement present
Non-purchasing 'Pro — coming soon' block names batch/fine-detail/pro-editing/cloud-backup
Zero purchasable surface, zero StoreKit code, zero locked toggles anywhere

tasks.title: Resume banner wiring
acceptance_criteria: Banner appears exactly once per real interruption recovery, driven only by TraceSession.interruptionRecoveryState
Correction-Review, Processing, and Workspace each call acknowledgeInterruptionRecovery() once displayed
Banner reappearing on a subsequent view of the same session is treated as a failing test

tasks.title: Full kill-and-relaunch integration matrix
acceptance_criteria: Five interruption points proven end-to-end as a system: captured, normalized, traced, edited, mid-gate-evaluation staging gap
Each point tested for both camera and import sources
Resume banner shown exactly once per scripted kill-and-relaunch
No ghost Recents entries ever appear from a rejected or interrupted capture

tasks.title: Privacy manifest and audit
acceptance_criteria: Every required-reason API actually used by the shipped app is declared (file timestamps, UserDefaults, etc.)
Audit re-run against final API usage, not reconstructed from memory
Zero third-party SDK entries, since none exist

tasks.title: Accessibility verification suite
acceptance_criteria: A real VoiceOver session verifies path-list select/delete/merge with zero required canvas interaction
Dynamic Type tested at accessibility sizes on all seven rejection cards with no truncation
Reduce Motion and Reduce Transparency variants both verified, not just implemented

tasks.title: Real-device performance and thermal validation
acceptance_criteria: Debounced simplify-slider interaction measured on real oldest-supported hardware, not simulator
Vectorize-under-load thermal behavior measured on physical device
Results recorded against a named pass/fail threshold

tasks.title: Empty/loading/success/error state coverage audit
acceptance_criteria: Every screen's reachable empty/loading/success/error states are enumerated and asserted to exist and render without crashing
Any screen missing a reachable state fails this test, rather than depending on a manual checklist
